title: stillingia gymnogyna
intro: Stillingia gymnogyna, also known as Queen's Root or Yellow Root, is a perennial plant native to North America that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Stillingia gymnogyna include treating digestive issues, fever reduction, and relieving symptoms of rheumatism and arthritis. Stillingia gymnogyna can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
